title_descriptor: Durable, High Visible, Safety Jacket Fabric
page_title: Durable, High Visible, Safety Jacket Fabric - ArNeo - Ariteks
spec_line: 150 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible Knit Fabric
description_blocks: ArNeo is 100% polyester, 150 g/m² warp knitted neon colored fabric for safety jackets. It is the top class fabric with heavy weight and high filament yarn for all kind of safety jackets.
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
150 g/m² , 100% Polyester, High Visible Knit Fabric

ArNeo is 100% polyester, 150 g/m² warp knitted neon colored fabric for safety jackets. It is the top class fabric with heavy weight and high filament yarn for all kind of safety jackets. It is EN ISO 20471 certified. Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light. As a result they shine more than other objects. Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyester (PES) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 75/72 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 150 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1000 kPa (kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 6.2 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants EN ISO 14362-1 Application Safety Jacket Quality Management Done ISO 9001 High Visibility Done EN ISO 20471 Technical Documents >> ArNeo Data Sheet Certificates TS EN ISO 20471 TS EN ISO 20471 Test Report

, 100% Polyester, High Visible Knit Fabric
ArNeo is 100% polyester, 150 g/m² warp knitted neon colored fabric for safety jackets. It is the top class fabric with heavy weight and high filament yarn for all kind of safety jackets.
It is EN ISO 20471 certified.
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
